whale_accumulation.title: Acumulacion Ballena: {symbol}
whale_accumulation.message: Consenso smart money {consensus_score:.0f}/100 para {symbol} — {wallets_buying} wallets comprando (neto ${net_usd:,.0f} USD). Tier-A activo: {tier_a_active}.

liquidity_event.title: Liquidez Baja: {symbol}
liquidity_event.message: Liquidez de {symbol} cayo a ${liquidity_usd:,.0f} (debajo del umbral de ${min_liquidity_usd:,.0f}) en {chain}.

rug_risk_detected.title: Riesgo de Rug: {symbol}
rug_risk_detected.message: {symbol} score de riesgo {risk_score}/100 supera umbral de {risk_threshold}. Flags de seguridad: {security_flags}.

explosion_score_jump.title: Explosion de Score: {symbol}
explosion_score_jump.message: {symbol} universe score salto a {universe_score:.0f}/100 (umbral: {score_threshold}) — categoria: {category}, chain: {chain}.
